query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_aditivos FROM termos_aditivos; SELECT ta.id, ta.instrumentoId, i.numero, ta.descricao FROM termos_aditivos ta JOIN instrumentos i ON ta.instrumentoId = i.id LIMIT 15;
